2025-03-22T07:25:00.CONTENT_EN:
Light Rail service near Tin Yuet Stop is suspended because of an external vehicle damaged the overhead line. Please consider using other transport. 
Please allow more time for travel.
2025-03-22T07:25:00.CONTENT_CN:
受外來車輛損毀架空電纜影響，天悅站附近的輕鐵服務暫停。
請考慮使用其他交通工具。
請為行程預留充裕時間。

2025-03-22T07:48:00.CONTENT_EN:
Light Rail service near Tin Yuet Stop is disrupted because of an external vehicle damaged the overhead line. 
Light Rail service diversion:
Route 705 and Route 706 will not stop between Tin Yuet and Tin Heng stops;
Route 751 will not stop between Chestwood and Tin Yat stops. 
​​​​​​​A free MTR Shuttle Bus service is running en-route 705 and 706 stops.
2025-03-22T07:48:00.CONTENT_CN:
受外來車輛損毀架空電纜影響,天悅站附近的輕鐵服務受阻。
輕鐵路綫改道如下：
705綫及706綫不停天悅站至天恆站；
751綫不停翠湖站至天逸站。
港鐵已安排免費接駁巴士，來往705綫及706綫沿途各站。

2025-03-22T08:13:00.CONTENT_EN:
Light Rail service disruption because of an external vehicle damaged the overhead line near Tin Yuet Stop. Light Rail service diversion:

2025-03-22T08:13:00.CONTENT_CN:

2025-03-22T10:15:00.CONTENT_EN: Light Rail service disruption because of an external vehicle damaged the overhead line near Tin Yuet Stop. Light Rail service diversion: Route 705 and Route 706 are running between Tin Yat and Tin Yiu stops, will not stop between Tin Heng and Tin Shui Wai stops; Route 751 is diverted through Tin Yiu and Tin Shui stops, will not stop between Chestwood and Tin Shui Wai stops. A free MTR Shuttle Bus service is running en-route 705 and 706 stops.
2025-03-22T10:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 天悅站附近受外來車輛損毀架空電纜影響，輕鐵服務受阻。 輕鐵路綫改道如下： 705綫及706綫，維持來往天逸站及天耀站，而不停天恆站至天水圍站； 751綫改經天耀站至天瑞站，而不停翠湖站至天水圍站。 港鐵已安排免費接駁巴士，來往705綫及706綫沿途各站。

2025-03-22T11:17:00.CONTENT_EN: The overhead line damaged by an external vehicle near Tin Yuet Stop has been fixed. Light Rail service is gradually resuming.
2025-03-22T11:17:00.CONTENT_CN: 天悅站附近被外來車輛損毀的架空電纜已復修，輕鐵服務逐步回復正常。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: traffic within Wo Hop Shek Cemetery

2025-03-22T08:30:00.CONTENT_EN: Members of the public are advised that, the traffic within Wo Hop Shek Cemetery and in its vicinity is expected to be busier on the weekends during the period of Ching Ming Festival. Special traffic and transport arrangements are implemented in Wo Hop Shek for Ching Ming Festival, please visit TD’s webpage for details. Motorists are advised to keep in view the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts and TD's "HKeMobility" mobile application. In case of traffic congestion, motorists should exercise tolerance and patience, and follow the instructions of the Police.
2025-03-22T08:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 公眾人士請留意，和合石墳場內及附近一帶路道的交通預計在清明節期間的週末會較為繁忙。當局已在清明節期間於和合石實施特別交通及運輸安排，有關詳情請參閲運輸署網頁。駕駛人士亦請留意電台、電視台或「香港出行易」流動應用程式發放的最新交通消息。如遇交通受阻，駕駛人士請保持忍讓，並遵從警方的指示。
